title: Hardware Installation Conveyor Tracking
description:
Hardware Installation Conveyor Tracking

Hardware Installation

To use conveyor tracking, you must install encoders for each physical conveyor on the system.  Each encoder is wired to a single channel on a PG (Pulse Generator) board.  Each board can accommodate up to 4 encoders.  A trigger input is also provided for each encoder to latch position, such as when used with a vision camera with a strobe.
